untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition (broadening formation structure with expanding highs/lows) which cannot be expressed as simple indicator conditions. Specific failure rate thresholds (50% fail >20%, 63% fail >30%) and measure rule projections require multi-bar pattern analysis not available in indicator set. Breakout timing window (3-6 weeks) and conservative entry filters based on statistical probability also require pattern-level logic.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses Donchian channel breakouts as proxy for broadening formation breakouts (BOTH directions supported). Hold period set to 42 days (6 weeks max). Stop loss at 2% reflects conservative approach mentioned. Exit conditions use conservative return thresholds given author's warning about unlikely measure rule targets. This is a simplified approximation; proper implementation requires dedicated pattern recognition logic.
